name: Edge: customer-tier extreme — three PLATINUM orders concurrently at risk + 2-week delay
rubric_notes: Concentrated PLATINUM exposure — three PLATINUM customers all at risk, one within the <24h imminent rule (Defense Systems One at 20h). Cover (36h) just barely exceeds the imminent threshold. Delay (336h = 14 days) >> cover. Multiple rules fire (1, 2, 3); all converge on immediate_switch. acceptable_actions intentionally singleton because partial_order doesn't credibly cover three PLATINUM orders with one alt. Severity CRITICAL via both <24h-stockout proximity AND PLATINUM-in-<24h. Confidence HIGH — no reasonable counter-argument. Worth flagging that the eval should check whether the Arbiter explicitly notes the CONCENTRATION of PLATINUMs (vs treating it as a single PLATINUM event) — concentration risk should be in the swing_condition narrative.
